rationale: All required elements are present and correct: purple #7C5CFF-style ring with a contrasting white star mark, bold wide-tracked white NOVA wordmark, and a muted gray 'light the way' tagline on a near-black field, with assembly, text rise (wordmark mid-fade at the 25% still), hold, and a final fade to black all readable in order. The filmstrip shows a coherent build (rotating/scaling star settling, then text rising) with no teleporting, but the hold tiles look essentially static (the called-for subtle float is not evident) and the second-to-last tile still shows the lockup at full opacity, suggesting the 4.2-5.0s scale-and-fade is compressed or late. Composition is well centered with clean hierarchy and nothing clipped; type and glow treatment are tidy if slightly default. Ships after one small timing/float revision.
